mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT m.id, m.parent_id, m.menu_name, m.path, m.component, m.perms, m.type, m.order_num, m.visible, m.status, m.icon, m.create_time, m.update_time, m.create_by, m.update_by, m.del_flag FROM sys_menu m INNER JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON m.id = rm.menu_id INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON rm.role_id = ur.role_id INNER JOIN sys_role r ON ur.role_id = r.id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND m.status = '0' AND m.del_flag = '0' AND r.del_flag = '0' ORDER BY m.parent_id, m.order_num
